name: Dream Mirror Recap
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>語</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かた</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>らい
name_jp_tl: Dreamtelling of the Dream Magic Mirror
desc: If a "Dream Mirror" monster you control would be Tributed to activate its own effect, shuffle it into the Deck instead of sending it to the GY. During the Main Phase: You can send this face-up card to the GY; place 1 of your "Dream Mirror of Joy" or "Dream Mirror of Terror" that is banished or in your GY, face-up in your Field Zone, then you can Special Summon 1 monster from your hand that specifically lists that card you placed in its text.
eff: If a "Dream Mirror" monster you control would be Tributed to activate its own effect, shuffle it into the Deck instead of sending it to the GY. During the Main Phase: You can send this face-up card to the GY; place 1 of your "Dream Mirror of Joy" or "Dream Mirror of Terror" that is banished or in your GY, face-up in your Field Zone, then you can Special Summon 1 monster from your hand that specifically lists that card you placed in its text.

action: Returns to the Deck cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Places cards from your Graveyard in your Field Zone
Places your banished cards in your Field Zone
